name: Me Time With Frangela
overview: Frances Callier and Angela V. Shelton headline this interactive 30-minute talk show exploring and debating the headlines, topics and characters of the day. Also with expert interviews and video chats with guests and viewers.

trailers.title: Me Time With Frangela - COMING TO A TV OR COMPUTER NEAR YOU NEXT WEEK!
Me Time With Frangela - COMING MONDAY SEPTEMBER 10TH!
